message:
feat(bins): add native-rust-preview engine to pijs_workload and improve ext validation classification

pijs_workload changes:
- Add --runtime-engine flag with quickjs and native-rust-preview variants
  to isolate runtime-engine overhead in micro-benchmarks
- Implement NativeBenchRuntime with synthetic begin/drain/complete
  roundtrip cycle for zero-overhead baseline measurement
- Results show ~953x speedup potential (8.42us QuickJS vs 0.009us native)
  validating the native runtime migration direction
- Add per_call_us_f64 and elapsed_us fields to JSON output for precision
- Add runtime_engine field to benchmark output for artifact traceability
- Include unit test for native runtime roundtrip resolution

ext_full_validation changes:
- Improve vendored candidate classification: items with notes indicating
  they are not direct ExtensionAPI entrypoints now classify as
  NotExtension (confidence 0.99) instead of NeedsReview
- Missing-manifest items now classify as HarnessGap (confidence 0.84)
  with more actionable suggested fixes
- Add derive_candidate_id_variants() for npm scoped package normalization
  (npm/@scope/name → npm/scope-name) improving manifest cross-reference
- Accept item_notes parameter in classify_vendored for note-based routing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
